data.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute: 27 countries around the world actively hold or use Bitcoin
data.description: Citing data from the Bitcoin Policy Institute, Bitcoin News reports that 27 countries around the world actively hold or use Bitcoin, with another 13 considering related proposals. These countries' exposure to Bitcoin includes reserves, mining, pensions, and taxation.

data.title: Solana stablecoin issuance exceeds $30 billion, and ecosystem TVL exceeds $40 billion
data.description: SolanaFloor posted on the X platform that the issuance of RWAs and stablecoins in the Solana ecosystem surged this week. Solana's stablecoin supply has exceeded $30 billion, and the ecosystem's TVL has exceeded $40 billion.

data.title: Trump faces economic risks if he fires Fed Governor Cook
data.description: Market News: Former Federal Reserve Board members and Treasury officials, including Bernanke, Greenspan, Summers, and Paulson, have signed a friend-of-the-court brief supporting Fed Board member Tim Cook's dismissal battle in the Supreme Court. Bipartisan groups have warned of economic risks if President Trump fires Fed Board member Tim Cook. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ripple’s Stuart Alderoty: Crypto doesn’t need a Dodd-Frank moment as lawmakers work to draft rules for digital assets
data.description:
The cryptocurrency industry doesn't need Dodd-Frank like legislation, said Ripple Chief Legal Officer Stuart Alderoty.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/372366/ripples-alderoty-crypto-dodd-frank-moment-lawmakers-rules-digital-assets?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: PayPal partners with Spark to boost PYUSD liquidity to $1 billion
data.description: PayPal has partnered with decentralized finance platform Spark to expand on-chain liquidity for PayPal USD (PYUSD) from its current $100 million to $1 billion through decentralized finance lending. PYUSD, issued by Paxos and pegged to the US dollar, has been integrated into Spark's lending marketplace, SparkLend. This integration allows users to provide and borrow PYUSD, with liquidity backed by Spark's $8 billion stablecoin reserve pool. Within weeks of launch, PYUSD deposits on SparkLend exceeded $100 million. Phoenix Labs CEO Sam MacPherson stated that predictable access to deep liquidity is key to the rapid expansion of stablecoins like PYUSD. This partnership model contrasts with traditional liquidity programs that rely on expensive market maker incentives, providing predictable depth through set borrowing costs. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Fractal Bitcoin launches wFB based on Ethereum
data.description: Fractal Bitcoin announced the launch of wFB (Wrapped FB), an Ethereum-based asset backed 1:1 by FB assets locked on the Fractal mainnet, with reserves fully and publicly verifiable on-chain. An initial 2.1 million FB will be locked up and minted as wFB, funded by Fractal's 8.4 million FB pledged for cross-chain ecosystem development. The remaining FB will be processed in phases, with pre-announced and executed transparently on-chain. "wFB not only expands FB's use cases, but also strives to build lasting connections between ecosystems," said Lorenzo, a core contributor at Fractal and founder of UniSat Wallet. "As we build a framework for shared community growth, we combine the security of Bitcoin with the flexibility of Ethereum to make Bitcoin's value more accessible and practical."

data.title: Traders have a strong consensus on ETH bearishness and are actively selling ETH put and call options.
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.Live, wrote that the community has reached a strong bearish consensus on ETH, believing that its upside potential above $4,100 is limited and that a significant decline is possible. Traders are actively selling ETH put and call options, betting on continued weakness and range-bound trading. In contrast, the market is becoming increasingly bullish on Bitcoin, with $115,000 seen as a trigger point for a significant rally.

data.title: Treasury companies: Is BTC good for smaller corporate buyers?
data.description:
Treasury companies are suffering a worse drawdown than the crypto market, with some small BTC buyers down over 97% from their one-year peak.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/treasury-companies-is-btc-good-for-buyers/

data.title: REX-Osprey first to launch staking Ethereum ETF as BlackRock, Fidelity await SEC
data.description:
The SEC needs more time to review applications to allow staking for the Ethereum ETFs issued by BlackRock, Fidelity and Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Since 2025, Circle has issued a total of $31 billion in USDC on Solana.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Circle has issued an additional $250 million in USDC on the Solana chain. Since 2025, Circle has issued a total of $31 billion in USDC on the Solana chain.

data.title: In the past 12 hours, the entire network has liquidated $475 million, mainly in long positions.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past 12 hours, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of US$475 million, of which long positions have been liquidated for US$440 million and short positions have been liquidated for US$34.7541 million.

data.title: POP Culture plans to establish a $100 million Crypto Pop Fund and expand its treasury to 1,000 BTC.
data.description: According to PRNewswire, Nasdaq-listed POP Culture plans to expand its Bitcoin treasury to 1,000 BTC to support its establishment of a $100 million digital trend fund "Crypto Pop Fund". The company disclosed last week that it had spent $33 million to buy 300 Bitcoins.

data.title: SunPerp's cumulative trading volume exceeded 17.17 million USDT in 8 days of public beta
data.description: According to official social media, SunPerp, a decentralized perpetual contract exchange within the TRON ecosystem, has surpassed 6,000 users and accumulated over 17.17 million USDT in trading volume on its eighth day of public beta. Notably, SunPerp will use $SUN as its platform token and plans to use platform revenue for $SUN buybacks and burns. Since the public beta launch, $SUN on-chain transactions have increased significantly.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based XPL perpetual contracts with a leverage range of 1-50x
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined XPL perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 50x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously. Additionally, participants can participate in the CandyBomb special event, where they can unlock airdrops by completing specific contract trading volume tasks. Individual participants can receive up to 500 XPL, with a total prize pool of 100,000 XPL. The event runs until 21:00 (UTC+8) on October 2nd.

data.title: Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF Adds Support for XRP, SOL, and XLM
data.description: Hashdex announced in a post on the X platform that its Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index US ETF (NCIQ) has expanded to include XRP, SOL, and XLM, allowing US investors to gain exposure to five crypto assets: BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, and XLM through a single investment vehicle.
